tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dbmaj9[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Eb7sus4[/ch] [ch]Absus4[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Darlin' I, I can't explain[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb7[/ch]
Where did we lose our way?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Girl it's drivin' me insane[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
And I know I just need one more chance[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
To prove my love to you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb7[/ch]
And if you come back to me I'll guarantee[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
That I'll never let you go[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]      [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Abmaj7[/ch] [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]      [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]Bbm9[/ch]       [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Db9[/ch]
The way they use to be?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Oh God give me a reason[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Eb7sus4[/ch] ([ch]Absus4[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch])


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
   So many nights I dream of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb7[/ch]                 [ch]Eb7/F[/ch]
Holding my pillow tight and I know[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
I don't need to be alone, yeah[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
When I open up my eyes to face reality[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb7[/ch]                 [ch]Eb7/F[/ch]       [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Every moment without you it seems like eternity[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
I'm begging you, begging you come back to me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]     [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]      [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bbm9[/ch]         [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Db9[/ch]
The way they use to be?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Oh God give me a reason[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]


[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb7sus4[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
      I'll never walk again       until you come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb7sus4[/ch]         [ch]Absus4[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
   Baby, I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
   Please forgive me for all the wrong I've done[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Eb7[/ch]
Please come back home, girl[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
I know you put all your trust in me,    I'm sorry I let you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]         [ch]Bdim[/ch]
   Please forgive me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]
I'm Gonna swallow my pride Say I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                           [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]G7(#5)[/ch]
Stop pointing fingers the blame is   on me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]
I want a new life and I want it with you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]G7(#5)[/ch]
If you feel the same, don't ever let it go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmadd9[/ch]                           [ch]Bdim[/ch]
      You gotta believe in the spirit of love[/tab]
      Cm7/Bb                    Am7(b5)
It'll heal all things It won't hurt anymore
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]
No I don't believe our love's terminal[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm9[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]    [ch]A/B[/ch]
I'm down on my knees       begging you please come home[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]D/E[/ch]       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]A/B[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]D/E[/ch]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]A/B[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Bm9[/ch]         [ch]D/E[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]              [ch]D9[/ch]
The way they used to be?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Oh God give me a reason[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A/B[/ch]            [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
I'm down on bended,down on bended knee[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]F/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]F/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Cm9[/ch]         [ch]F/Eb[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb9[/ch]
The way they use to be?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Oh God give me a reason[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]


[tab][ch]Eb/F[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I'll never walk again,       Till you come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb/F[/ch]            [ch]Bbsus[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]
